task: Stop Datalox wrapper runs from defaulting to legacy trace receipts and make the default capture path record explicit debugging_trajectory.v1 rows.
summary: Changed wrapper defaults from legacy trace recording to explicit trajectory-row capture, preserving legacy maintenance modes only behind explicit post-run mode selection.
observations: user: Reported that another repo with datalox-mcp installed still produced old legacy trace-shaped events.
agent: Inspected the MCP split and found that datalox-mcp exposes only record_trajectory/export_trajectories while the wrapper post-run path still called legacy record_turn_result.
agent: Changed wrapper post-run behavior so the default mode is trajectory instead of auto/review/record.
agent: Added parsing for DATALOX_TRAJECTORY_ROW and DATALOX_TRAJECTORY_ROW_FILE markers, with repo-local file validation.
agent: Updated wrapped prompt guidance to tell agents to write explicit debugging_trajectory.v1 row files after coding-debugging work.
agent: Changed installed Codex and Claude shim defaults to DATALOX_DEFAULT_POST_RUN_MODE=trajectory.
agent: Updated CLI help and docs to include the trajectory post-run mode and explicit marker contract.
agent: Updated wrapper/adoption/retrieval tests so legacy recording is explicit and default wrapper capture requires a trajectory marker.

task.prompt: Stop Datalox wrapper runs from defaulting to legacy trace receipts and make the default capture path record explicit debugging_trajectory.v1 rows.

context.error: Wrapped runs were still producing legacy eventKind/eventClass/sourceKind trace objects without payload.trajectoryRow, so trajectory export saw no visible sellable rows.

relevant_files.before: finalizeWrappedRun defaulted to auto, built a legacy observed-turn payload, and called recordTurnResult for every wrapped run.
relevant_files.after: finalizeWrappedRun defaults to trajectory mode, reads DATALOX_TRAJECTORY_ROW or DATALOX_TRAJECTORY_ROW_FILE markers, and records only explicit rows through recordTrajectory.

relevant_files.before: Installed Codex and Claude shims defaulted DATALOX_DEFAULT_POST_RUN_MODE to review.
relevant_files.after: Installed Codex and Claude shims default DATALOX_DEFAULT_POST_RUN_MODE to trajectory.

relevant_files.before: Wrapper tests expected a legacy trace event when no markers were emitted.
relevant_files.after: Wrapper tests expect no event without a trajectory marker and verify explicit trajectory row recording.

notes: Legacy record/promote/review modes remain available only when explicitly requested.
The wrapper does not reconstruct trajectory rows from prose or transcript text.

trajectory.content: Reported that another repo with datalox-mcp installed still produced old legacy trace-shaped events.
Inspected the MCP split and found that datalox-mcp exposes only record_trajectory/export_trajectories while the wrapper post-run path still called legacy record_turn_result.
Changed wrapper post-run behavior so the default mode is trajectory instead of auto/review/record.
Added parsing for DATALOX_TRAJECTORY_ROW and DATALOX_TRAJECTORY_ROW_FILE markers, with repo-local file validation.
Updated wrapped prompt guidance to tell agents to write explicit debugging_trajectory.v1 row files after coding-debugging work.
Changed installed Codex and Claude shim defaults to DATALOX_DEFAULT_POST_RUN_MODE=trajectory.
Updated CLI help and docs to include the trajectory post-run mode and explicit marker contract.
Updated wrapper/adoption/retrieval tests so legacy recording is explicit and default wrapper capture requires a trajectory marker.
Focused wrapper, adoption, retrieval, and trajectory export tests passed.
trajectory.command: npx vitest run tests/wrapperSurfaces.test.ts tests/adoptionScripts.test.ts tests/retrievalBackends.test.ts tests/trajectoryExport.test.ts

final.fix_summary: Changed wrapper defaults from legacy trace recording to explicit trajectory-row capture, preserving legacy maintenance modes only behind explicit post-run mode selection.
final.explanation: Default wrapper runs now create visible trajectory data only when the agent supplies a valid debugging_trajectory.v1 row marker; otherwise they do not create old-shape trace receipts.

outcome.label: success
outcome.command: npm run check && npm run build && npx vitest run tests/wrapperSurfaces.test.ts tests/adoptionScripts.test.ts tests/retrievalBackends.test.ts tests/trajectoryExport.test.ts && git diff --check
outcome.evidence: TypeScript check, build, focused tests, and git diff --check passed.

metadata.recorded_reason: User noticed this repo had no visible trajectory rows after the wrapper behavior change.
